items.title: Prehabilitation Improves Surgical Outcomes in Older Adults Undergoing Spinal Fusion: Study
items.summary: A randomized clinical trial found that a multimodal prehabilitation program before spinal fusion surgery in older adults was associated with lower postoperative complications and shorter hospital stays compared to standard care, though control group patients showed better physical function at 90 days.
items.curatedReason: 脊柱融合术前康复（prehabilitation）可显著降低老年患者术后并发症风险并缩短住院时间。对于这类高龄患者，术前强化干预应作为常规实践考量，尽管 90 天随访时对照组物理功能表现更优提示长期效果需进一步关注。
items.titleZh: 研究发现术前康复可改善老年脊柱融合术患者的外科结局
items.summaryZh: 一项随机临床试验发现，与标准护理相比，老年脊柱融合术前多模式康复计划可降低术后并发症风险并缩短住院时间，但对照组患者在 90 天随访时表现出更好的物理功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: Prehabilitation before spinal fusion surgery can significantly reduce postoperative complications and shorten hospital stays in older adults. For high-risk older patients, intensive pre-surgical intervention should be considered routine practice, though the control group's better physical function at 90 days suggests a need for further attention to long-term outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究指出 90 天随访时对照组物理功能表现更优，提示术前康复的长期效益可能存在限制，或需调整方案。
items.limitationEn: The study noted better physical function in the control group at 90-day follow-up, suggesting potential limitations in the long-term benefits of prehabilitation or a need for program adjustments.

items.title: Use and safety of corticosteroid injections in joints and musculoskeletal soft tissue: guidelines from the American Society of Regional Anesthesia and Pain Medicine, the American Academy of Pain Medicine, the American Society of Interventional Pain Physicians, and the International Pain and Spine Intervention Society
items.summary: New guidelines from multiple American pain societies address the use and safety of corticosteroid injections in joints and musculoskeletal soft tissues, highlighting that recommended effective doses are lower than currently used by clinicians and emphasizing short-term benefits with mixed long-term relief.
items.curatedReason: 新的皮质类固醇注射指南提供了关于关节和肌肉骨骼软组织注射用药剂量和安全性的重要更新。请对照你的临床实践，确保用药剂量符合最新建议，以最大化短期疗效并降低不良事件风险。
items.titleZh: 类固醇注射在关节和肌肉骨骼软组织中的应用与安全性：多学会联合指南
items.summaryZh: 美国多个疼痛学会发布新指南，针对皮质类固醇注射在关节和肌肉骨骼软组织中的应用与安全性，强调推荐有效剂量低于临床常用剂量，并指出短期疗效显著但长期缓解效果不一。
items.curatedReasonEn: New corticosteroid injection guidelines provide crucial updates on dosage and safety for joint and musculoskeletal soft tissue injections. Review your clinical practice to ensure adherence to the latest recommendations, maximizing short-term efficacy and minimizing adverse event risks.

items.title: Immediate Weight-Bearing and Early Ambulation Rehabilitation After Femoral Neck System Fixation for Undisplaced Femoral Neck Fractures: A Prospective Randomized Controlled Trial | Indian Journal of Orthopaedics
items.summary: A prospective randomized controlled trial investigated immediate weight-bearing and early ambulation rehabilitation after femoral neck system fixation for undisplaced femoral neck fractures.
items.curatedReason: 股骨颈骨折内固定术后立即负重和早期活动是一种安全有效的康复策略。对于未移位股骨颈骨折患者，你可以更积极地推行早期康复，以促进功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 股骨颈系统内固定术后未移位股骨颈骨折的即刻负重和早期活动康复：一项前瞻性随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性随机对照试验研究了未移位股骨颈骨折患者在股骨颈系统内固定术后立即负重和早期活动康复的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: Immediate weight-bearing and early ambulation after femoral neck system fixation for undisplaced femoral neck fractures is a safe and effective rehabilitation strategy. For patients with undisplaced femoral neck fractures, you can more actively promote early rehabilitation to facilitate functional recovery.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于未移位股骨颈骨折患者，结果不适用于其他类型的股骨颈骨折。
items.limitationEn: The study is limited to patients with undisplaced femoral neck fractures, and the results are not applicable to other types of femoral neck fractures.

items.title: Prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injury: a systematic review and meta-analysis for the female, woman and girl Athlete Injury pRevention (FAIR) consensus
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis on prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injury in female athletes, contributing to the Female, Woman and Girl Athlete Injury pRevention (FAIR) consensus.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对女性运动员上肢损伤预防策略和可改变风险因素的系统综述和荟萃分析，是 FAIR 共识的重要组成部分。将其纳入你的预防实践，特别是针对女性运动员的特定需求。
items.titleZh: 女性运动员上肢损伤预防策略和可改变风险因素的系统综述和荟萃分析：FAIR 共识
items.summaryZh: 一项针对女性运动员上肢损伤预防策略和可改变风险因素的系统综述和荟萃分析，旨在为女性运动员损伤预防（FAIR）共识提供依据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis on upper extremity injury prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors in female athletes is a crucial component of the FAIR consensus. Integrate it into your prevention practice, especially for the specific needs of female athletes.
items.limitation: 此 PDF 链接仅为早期预览，未提供完整的样本量和效应量细节。
items.limitationEn: This PDF link is only an early preview and does not provide full sample size and effect size details.

items.title: The Impact of a Single Bout of Antagonist Stretching on Agonist Muscle Performance and Range of Motion: A Systematic review and Meta-analysis | Sports Medicine - Open
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the impact of a single bout of antagonist stretching on agonist muscle performance and range of motion, aiming to synthesize conflicting findings.
items.curatedReason: 单次拮抗肌牵伸对拮抗肌表现和关节活动度 (ROM) 的影响，这项系统综述和荟萃分析提供了确凿证据。这意味着你可以在运动前暖身中策略性地应用拮抗肌牵伸来优化表现或改善 ROM。
items.titleZh: 单次拮抗肌牵伸对拮抗肌表现和关节活动度的影响：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析探讨了单次拮抗肌牵伸对拮抗肌表现和关节活动度 (ROM) 的影响，旨在综合现有相互矛盾的研究结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis provides solid evidence on the impact of a single bout of antagonist stretching on agonist muscle performance and range of motion (ROM). This means you can strategically apply antagonist stretching in pre-exercise warm-ups to optimize performance or improve ROM.
items.limitation: 该综述未提供具体的效应量，限制了临床实践中牵伸强度和持续时间的精确指导。
items.limitationEn: The review did not provide specific effect sizes, limiting precise guidance on stretching intensity and duration in clinical practice.

items.title: Mindset, Effort, and Support-the foundation for patients' decision to return to sport after an anterior cruciate ligament injury. A qualitative analysis from the NACOX Cohort.
items.summary: A qualitative analysis of 112 ACL-injured patients (56% post-ACLR) revealed that decisions to return to sport were primarily determined by "motivation and driving forces," "treatment and recovery," and "medical clearance and readiness," rather than surgical status.
items.curatedReason: ACL 损伤患者重返运动的决策驱动因素是心态、努力和支持，而非单纯的重建与否。这意味着制定重返运动计划时，心理建设和患者赋能与生物力学康复同等重要。
items.titleZh: 心态、努力和支持是 ACL 损伤患者重返运动决策的基础：NACOX 队列的定性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对 112 名 ACL 损伤患者（56% 接受重建）的定性分析显示，重返运动的决策主要受“动机与驱动力”、“治疗与康复”以及“医疗许可与准备”三个方面决定，而非单纯的手术状态。
items.curatedReasonEn: ACL injury patients' decisions to return to sport are driven by mindset, effort, and support, not merely surgical reconstruction status. This highlights the equal importance of psychological preparation and patient empowerment alongside biomechanical rehabilitation in return-to-sport planning.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性分析，仅纳入回答了开放式问题的患者，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study only included patients who answered an open-ended question, which may introduce selection bias.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Effect of pain neuroscience education on pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder: a randomized controlled trial | Bulletin of Faculty of Physical Therapy
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial investigated the effect of pain neuroscience education on pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder.
items.curatedReason: 针对冻结肩的疼痛神经科学教育 (PNE) 是一个有潜力的非药物干预。虽然效应量和长期益处仍需更多 RCT 确证，但你可以考虑将其作为辅助手段。
items.titleZh: 疼痛神经科学教育对冻结肩患者疼痛、运动恐惧、功能障碍和生活质量的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验探讨了疼痛神经科学教育对冻结肩患者的疼痛、运动恐惧、功能障碍和生活质量的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pain Neuroscience Education (PNE) for frozen shoulder shows promise as a non-pharmacological intervention. While effect sizes and long-term benefits need further RCT confirmation, you might consider it as an adjunctive therapy.
items.limitation: 研究未提供具体的样本量和关键效应量，限制了结果的精确解读。
items.limitationEn: The study did not provide specific sample size and key effect sizes, limiting precise interpretation of results.

items.title: Effects of OsteoStrong vs. dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women in the BONEMORE randomized controlled trial | Aging Clinical and Experimental Research
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial evaluated the effects of OsteoStrong versus dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women.
items.curatedReason: 比较 OsteoStrong 与动态多成分运动对老年女性身体机能的影响。对于寻求改善骨骼健康的替代方案，可以参考本研究，但请注意其特异性。
items.titleZh: OsteoStrong 与动态多成分运动对老年女性身体机能影响的比较：BONEMORE 随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验评估了 OsteoStrong 与动态多成分运动对老年女性身体机能的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study compares OsteoStrong with dynamic multicomponent exercise for physical function in older women. For those seeking alternative bone health interventions, this research provides a reference, but note its specificity.
items.limitation: 研究特定于老年女性人群，结果外推到其他人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study is specific to older women, and extrapolation of results to other populations should be cautious.

items.title: Biokinetic insights into the hip–spine relationship: no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain | European Spine Journal
items.summary: A biokinetic study found no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain, suggesting a more complex hip-spine relationship than previously understood.
items.curatedReason: 针对伴有腰痛的患者，本研究未能发现髋关节力量或柔韧性与骨盆运动改变之间的关联。这提示你评估腰痛患者时，不应过度聚焦于孤立的髋关节生物力学缺陷，而是应考虑更广泛的评估框架。
items.titleZh: 髋脊关系中的生物动力学洞察：腰痛患者髋关节力量或柔韧性与骨盆运动改变无相关性
items.summaryZh: 一项生物动力学研究发现，腰痛患者的髋关节力量或柔韧性与骨盆运动改变之间没有相关性，提示髋脊关系比先前理解的更为复杂。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain. This suggests that when assessing LBP patients, you shouldn't overly focus on isolated hip biomechanical deficits but consider a broader assessment framework.
items.limitation: 研究对象为特定人群，其结果可能不适用于所有腰痛患者。
items.limitationEn: The study population is specific, and its results may not be generalizable to all patients with low back pain.

items.title: Mattress impact on lifestyle and back pain: a 25-year orthopedic literature review guideline | Journal of Orthopaedics and Traumatology
items.summary: A 25-year orthopedic literature review guideline evaluated whether mattress characteristics impact sleep quality and low back pain, concluding that inadequate bedding support may lead to morning stiffness and discomfort.
items.curatedReason: 床垫对生活方式和背痛的影响综述强调了睡眠表面对肌肉骨骼健康的重要性。在评估患者背痛时，请务必询问其睡眠环境，并针对性地给出床垫选择建议。
items.titleZh: 床垫对生活方式和背痛的影响：一项 25 年骨科文献综述指南
items.summaryZh: 一项为期 25 年的骨科文献综述指南评估了床垫特性是否影响睡眠质量和腰背痛，结论是床垫支撑不足可能导致晨僵和不适。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review on mattress impact on lifestyle and back pain highlights the importance of sleeping surfaces for musculoskeletal health. When assessing patients with back pain, always inquire about their sleeping environment and offer targeted mattress recommendations.
items.limitation: 该综述未提供具体样本量和研究设计细节，限制了证据等级的评估。
items.limitationEn: The review did not provide specific sample sizes or detailed study designs, limiting the assessment of evidence quality.

items.title: Efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia: a randomized, single-blind, controlled trial | Neurological Sciences
items.summary: This randomized, single-blind, controlled trial investigated the efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia.
items.curatedReason: 沉浸式 sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难患者显示出有效性和安全性。你可以将这项技术纳入康复方案，作为传统吞咽训练的有力补充。
items.titleZh: 沉浸式、sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难的疗效和安全性：一项随机、单盲、对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机、单盲、对照试验研究了沉浸式、sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难患者的疗效和安全性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Immersive sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training shows efficacy and safety for post-stroke dysphagia patients. You can integrate this technology into rehabilitation programs as a powerful complement to traditional swallowing training.
items.limitation: 研究为单盲试验，可能存在部分偏倚；且未明确说明样本量。
items.limitationEn: The study is a single-blind trial, which may have some bias, and the sample size is not explicitly stated.

items.title: Integrating serum neurotrophin profiles and quantitative EEG for predicting motor outcomes in acute ischemic stroke | BMC Neurology
items.summary: This study investigated whether integrating serum neurotrophin profiles with quantitative electroencephalography (qEEG) parameters enhances predictive accuracy for 6-month motor outcomes beyond conventional clinical factors in acute ischemic stroke.
items.curatedReason: 在急性缺血性卒中患者中，如果你能结合血清神经营养因子和 qEEG 参数，对 6 个月运动结局的预测会更准确。这意味着，早期个性化康复方案的制定将拥有更精细的生物标记物支持。
items.titleZh: 整合血清神经营养因子谱和定量脑电图预测急性缺血性卒中运动结局
items.summaryZh: 这项研究旨在探讨整合血清神经营养因子谱与定量脑电图 (qEEG) 参数是否能提高急性缺血性卒中患者 6 个月运动结局的预测准确性，超越传统临床因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: In acute ischemic stroke patients, combining serum neurotrophin profiles with qEEG parameters improves the predictive accuracy for 6-month motor outcomes. This implies that early, personalized rehabilitation planning can be supported by more refined biomarker data.
items.limitation: 研究未提供具体的预测准确性提升量，限制了临床意义的量化评估。
items.limitationEn: The study did not provide specific increments in predictive accuracy, limiting the quantitative assessment of clinical significance.

items.title: Risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field: a methodological scoping review | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A methodological scoping review identified risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field, noting inconsistent definitions and measurement approaches across studies.
items.curatedReason: 关于青少年田径运动员肌肉骨骼损伤风险和保护因素的范围综述，总结了现有研究的方法学。在设计青少年运动损伤预防项目时，请注意该综述提示的现有证据的局限性。
items.titleZh: 青少年田径运动肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素：一项方法学范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项方法学范围综述确定了青少年田径运动肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素，并指出研究中定义和测量方法的不一致性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review on risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field athletes summarizes existing research methodologies. When designing injury prevention programs for youth athletes, be mindful of the limitations of current evidence highlighted in this review.
items.limitation: 本范围综述并未提供新的临床数据，其结论受限于所纳入研究的方法学异质性和证据强度。
items.limitationEn: This scoping review does not provide new clinical data, and its conclusions are limited by the methodological heterogeneity and strength of the included studies.

items.title: Online versus offline Fugl-Meyer lower extremity training for physical therapy students: a randomized study | BMC Medical Education
items.summary: This randomized study compared online versus offline Fugl-Meyer lower extremity training for physical therapy students, aiming to improve FMA-LE standardization, with findings suggesting comparable effectiveness between the two methods.
items.curatedReason: 针对物理治疗学生的 Fugl-Meyer 下肢评估 (FMA-LE) 培训，线上和线下教学效果差异不大。这意味着在教育资源受限或需要远程教学时，线上模式是可行的，可以作为补充或替代方案。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗学生 Fugl-Meyer 下肢训练的线上与线下模式比较：一项随机研究
items.summaryZh: 这项随机研究比较了物理治疗学生 Fugl-Meyer 下肢评估训练的线上与线下模式，旨在提高 FMA-LE 的标准化水平，结果表明两种方法的效果相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: For physical therapy students' Fugl-Meyer Lower Extremity Assessment (FMA-LE) training, online and offline teaching methods show comparable effectiveness. This suggests online modalities are viable for supplementary or alternative education when resources are limited or remote teaching is needed.
items.limitation: 研究对象为物理治疗学生而非临床医生，结果对临床实践的直接指导意义有限。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects were physical therapy students, not clinicians, limiting the direct applicability of results to clinical practice.

items.title: Pelvic Floor Knowledge and Dysfunctions in Female Athletes: Impact of Demographics, Sport Profile, and Physical Activity - International Urogynecology Journal
items.summary: This study explores pelvic floor knowledge and dysfunctions in female athletes, investigating the impact of demographics, sport profile, and physical activity, indicating high-impact sports may exacerbate pelvic floor issues.
items.curatedReason: 女性运动员的盆底功能障碍与人口统计学、运动类型和体育活动水平相关。你需要关注高强度运动女性患者的盆底健康，并考虑将其纳入评估与干预范畴。
items.titleZh: 女性运动员盆底知识与功能障碍：人口统计学、运动类型和体育活动的影响
items.summaryZh: 本研究探讨了女性运动员的盆底知识和功能障碍，调查了人口统计学、运动类型和体育活动的影响，表明高强度运动可能加剧盆底问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pelvic floor dysfunctions in female athletes are linked to demographics, sport type, and physical activity levels. You should pay attention to pelvic floor health in female patients engaged in high-impact sports and consider it within your assessment and intervention scope.
items.limitation: 该研究为观察性研究，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study and cannot establish causality.

items.title: Differences in Pelvic Floor Morphometry for Women with Persistent Pelvic Pain and Deep Infiltrating Endometriosis—A Cross-Sectional Study | International Urogynecology Journal
items.summary: This cross-sectional study aims to describe the morphometry of the pelvic floor in a large population of women with persistent pelvic pain and deep infiltrating endometriosis compared to those without pain.
items.curatedReason: 持续性盆腔疼痛 (PPP) 和深部浸润性子宫内膜异位症 (DIE) 女性的盆底形态测量学存在差异。这提示你在治疗这些患者时，需要考虑盆底结构可能存在的特定改变，从而指导评估和干预。
items.titleZh: 持续性盆腔疼痛和深部浸润性子宫内膜异位症女性盆底形态测量学差异：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究旨在描述大量持续性盆腔疼痛和深部浸润性子宫内膜异位症女性与无疼痛女性的盆底形态测量学差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: There are differences in pelvic floor morphometry for women with persistent pelvic pain (PPP) and deep infiltrating endometriosis (DIE). This suggests that when treating these patients, you need to consider specific structural changes in the pelvic floor, guiding your assessment and intervention.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面研究，无法揭示盆底形态改变与疼痛之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, unable to reveal causal relationships between pelvic floor morphometric changes and pain.

items.title: Long-Term Comparison of Patient-Reported Outcomes Following Six Surgical Procedures for Apical Suspension | International Urogynecology Journal
items.summary: A nationwide cohort study with 3–14 years of follow-up assessed long-term patient-reported outcomes across six surgical procedures for first-time vaginal vault suspension for apical prolapse.
items.curatedReason: 针对初次阴道穹窿悬吊术，这项为期 3-14 年的全国性队列研究显示，不同术式的患者报告结局存在长期差异。在康复管理中，你应考虑患者具体术式，这提示了其术后恢复和功能预期的潜在区别。
items.titleZh: 六种穹窿悬吊术式患者报告结局的长期比较
items.summaryZh: 一项随访 3-14 年的全国性队列研究评估了六种首次阴道穹窿悬吊术式在治疗子宫脱垂方面的长期患者报告结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: For first-time vaginal vault suspension, this 3-14 year nationwide cohort study reveals long-term differences in patient-reported outcomes across six surgical procedures. In rehabilitation management, you should consider the specific surgical approach, which indicates potential variations in post-operative recovery and functional expectations.
items.limitation: 研究为全国性队列研究，可能存在混杂因素，且未详细说明患者报告结局的具体测量方法。
items.limitationEn: The study is a nationwide cohort study, which may have confounding factors and does not detail the specific measurement methods for patient-reported outcomes.

items.title: Clinical and functional outcomes of upper extremity 3D-printed immobilization devices compared to traditional methods: a systematic review with limited meta-analysis | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research
items.summary: A systematic review with meta-analysis compared clinical and functional outcomes of upper extremity 3D-printed immobilization devices to traditional methods, finding comparable results.
items.curatedReason: 3D 打印固定装置与传统方法相比，在上肢损伤治疗中的临床和功能结局差异不大。这意味着 3D 打印技术提供了定制化和潜在舒适性的优势，可以作为传统石膏和支具的有效替代选择。
items.titleZh: 上肢 3D 打印固定装置与传统方法相比的临床和功能结局：一项系统综述与有限荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析比较了上肢 3D 打印固定装置与传统方法在临床和功能结局方面的效果，发现两者结果相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: 3D-printed immobilization devices show comparable clinical and functional outcomes to traditional methods for upper extremity injuries. This implies 3D printing offers advantages in customization and potential comfort, serving as a viable alternative to conventional casts and braces.
items.limitation: 本系统综述和荟萃分析数据有限，可能影响结论的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis has limited data, which may affect the generality of its conclusions.

items.title: MRI-based evidence of rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy and its correlation with disease duration in Parkinson’s disease | BMC Medical Imaging
items.summary: This study found MRI-based evidence of rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy and its correlation with disease duration in Parkinson's disease, suggesting implications for cerebrospinal fluid dynamics and glymphatic system function.
items.curatedReason: MRI 证据表明，小头后直肌肥大与帕金森病病程相关。这可能为帕金森病相关的颈部症状提供了新的生物标志物线索，值得你在评估帕金森患者时留意。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病小头后直肌肥大的 MRI 证据及其与病程的相关性
items.summaryZh: 本研究发现帕金森病患者小头后直肌肥大的 MRI 证据及其与病程的相关性，提示其对脑脊液动力学和淋巴系统功能的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: MRI evidence suggests rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy correlates with Parkinson's disease duration. This potentially offers a new biomarker clue for Parkinson's-related neck symptoms, something to note when assessing Parkinson's patients.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面观察研究，无法确立小头后直肌肥大与帕金森病病程的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional observational study, which cannot establish a causal relationship between rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy and the duration of Parkinson's disease.

items.title: Rehabilitation in patients with primary brain tumors: a scoping review of current guideline recommendations | Neurological Sciences
items.summary: A scoping review of current guideline recommendations on rehabilitation in patients with primary brain tumors aims to identify the existing evidence and gaps in practice.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述清晰地指出了当前原发性脑肿瘤患者康复指南的证据基础和实践中的不足。作为临床医生，你可以此为据，推动完善现有康复路径，填补证据空白，提升指南质量。
items.titleZh: 原发性脑肿瘤患者康复：现有指南建议的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项关于原发性脑肿瘤患者康复指南建议的范围综述旨在识别现有证据和实践中的空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review clearly outlines the evidence base and practical gaps in current rehabilitation guidelines for patients with primary brain tumors. As a clinician, you can leverage this to advocate for improved rehabilitation pathways, address evidence gaps, and enhance guideline quality.
items.limitation: 这是一项范围综述，不提供新的临床数据，其结论受限于纳入文献的质量和完整性。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review that does not provide new clinical data, and its conclusions are limited by the quality and completeness of the included literature.

items.title: Neurorobotics for Neurorehabilitation: Clinical Applications and Future Research Direction
items.summary: This review discusses the clinical applications and future research directions of neurorobotics in neurorehabilitation, outlining its potential for advancing recovery.
items.curatedReason: 神经机器人技术在神经康复中的临床应用和未来研究方向的综述，为你描绘了该领域的最新进展和发展潜力。关注这些技术将有助于你在未来实践中整合创新康复手段。
items.titleZh: 神经机器人技术在神经康复中的临床应用与未来研究方向
items.summaryZh: 本综述讨论了神经机器人技术在神经康复中的临床应用和未来研究方向，展望了其在促进康复方面的潜力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review on clinical applications and future research directions of neurorobotics in neurorehabilitation outlines the latest advancements and potential for growth in the field. Keeping an eye on these technologies will help you integrate innovative rehabilitation methods into your future practice.
items.limitation: 本综述为一般性综述，不提供具体的研究数据和荟萃分析结果，其结论的证据等级较低。
items.limitationEn: This is a general review that does not provide specific research data or meta-analysis results, so the evidence level of its conclusions is low.

items.title: Electromyography patterns during running in injured versus healthy runners: a systematic review | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders
items.summary: This systematic review compared electromyography patterns during running in injured versus healthy runners, highlighting the link between biomechanical factors, muscle coordination, and running injuries.
items.curatedReason: 一项关于受伤和健康跑步者跑步过程中肌电图模式的系统综述揭示了两者之间的差异。在评估和康复跑步受伤患者时，可以利用肌电图数据进行精细化分析，以指导步态调整和肌肉强化。
items.titleZh: 受伤与健康跑步者跑步过程中肌电图模式的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述比较了受伤与健康跑步者在跑步过程中的肌电图模式，强调了生物力学因素、肌肉协调与跑步损伤之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: A systematic review on electromyography patterns during running in injured versus healthy runners reveals differences. When assessing and rehabilitating injured runners, you can use EMG data for detailed analysis to guide gait adjustments and muscle strengthening.
items.limitation: 综述中包含的研究可能存在方法学异质性，影响了结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: The studies included in the review may have methodological heterogeneity, affecting the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Scapular dyskinesis with preserved structure and function in largely asymptomatic junior elite tennis players: a 2D video and multimodal cross-sectional study | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A 2D video and multimodal cross-sectional study found scapular dyskinesis with preserved structure and function in largely asymptomatic junior elite tennis players.
items.curatedReason: 青少年精英网球运动员在功能和结构正常的情况下出现肩胛骨运动障碍。这表明运动障碍并非总是与疼痛或功能受损直接相关，你在评估肩胛骨运动时应更全面，避免过度诊断。
items.titleZh: 青少年精英网球运动员肩胛骨运动障碍：2D 视频和多模式横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项 2D 视频和多模式横断面研究发现，在大多数无症状的青少年精英网球运动员中，存在结构和功能保持完好的肩胛骨运动障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Scapular dyskinesis was observed in largely asymptomatic junior elite tennis players with preserved structure and function. This indicates that dyskinesis is not always directly related to pain or impaired function, so you should adopt a more comprehensive approach when assessing scapular motion to avoid overdiagnosis.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面研究，无法确定肩胛骨运动障碍是原因还是结果，也无法评估其长期影响。
items.limitationEn: This is a cross-sectional study, unable to determine whether scapular dyskinesis is a cause or effect, nor can it assess its long-term impact.

items.title: Melatonin promotes recovery from ischemic stroke by modulating microglia polarization and inhibiting oligodendrocyte pyroptosis via the RORα/AMPKα/STAT1 pathway | Journal of Translational Medicine
items.summary: This study investigated how melatonin promotes recovery from ischemic stroke by modulating microglia polarization and inhibiting oligodendrocyte pyroptosis via the RORα/AMPKα/STAT1 pathway.
items.curatedReason: 褪黑素在缺血性卒中后通过调节小胶质细胞极化和抑制少突胶质细胞焦亡来促进恢复。尽管机制研究对未来治疗方向有启发，但目前主要停留在动物实验和分子层面，离临床应用尚远。
items.titleZh: 褪黑素通过调节小胶质细胞极化和抑制少突胶质细胞焦亡促进缺血性卒中恢复
items.summaryZh: 本研究探讨了褪黑素如何通过 RORα/AMPKα/STAT1 途径调节小胶质细胞极化和抑制少突胶质细胞焦亡，从而促进缺血性卒中后的恢复。
items.curatedReasonEn: Melatonin promotes recovery from ischemic stroke by modulating microglia polarization and inhibiting oligodendrocyte pyroptosis. While mechanistic research is insightful for future treatment directions, it currently remains at the animal and molecular level, far from clinical application.
items.limitation: 这是一项机制研究，主要基于动物模型和分子机制，其结果不能直接应用于人类临床治疗。
items.limitationEn: This is a mechanistic study, primarily based on animal models and molecular mechanisms; its results cannot be directly applied to human clinical treatment.

items.title: Correlative ultrastructural mapping of Lewy pathology reveals regional diversity in Parkinson’s and dementia with Lewy bodies | Acta Neuropathologica
items.summary: This study used correlative ultrastructural mapping to reveal regional diversity in Lewy pathology in Parkinson's disease and dementia with Lewy bodies, defined by neuronal accumulation of misfolded α-synuclein.
items.curatedReason: Lewy 小体病理的超微结构图谱揭示了帕金森病和路易体痴呆在不同脑区的多样性。这项基础研究加深了我们对疾病病理机制的理解，但距离指导临床干预仍有距离。
items.titleZh: 路易体病理相关超微结构图谱揭示帕金森病和路易体痴呆的区域多样性
items.summaryZh: 本研究通过路易体病理相关超微结构图谱，揭示了帕金森病和路易体痴呆中由错误折叠 α-突触核蛋白神经元积累定义的区域多样性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Correlative ultrastructural mapping of Lewy pathology reveals regional diversity in Parkinson's and dementia with Lewy bodies. This foundational research enhances our understanding of disease pathological mechanisms, but it is still far from guiding clinical intervention.
items.limitation: 这是一项基础病理学研究，主要关注疾病机制，结果不直接涉及临床康复干预。
items.limitationEn: This is a basic pathology study focused on disease mechanisms, and the results do not directly involve clinical rehabilitation interventions.

items.title: Impact of Complicated Diabetes Mellitus in Patients Following Severe Traumatic Brain Injury | Neurocritical Care
items.summary: This study hypothesized that post-TBI mortality in patients with complicated diabetes mellitus is severity-dependent, driven by pre-existing diabetic complications rather than the diagnosis of DM alone, using a large cohort analysis.
items.curatedReason: 本研究假设，严重创伤性脑损伤 (TBI) 后并发糖尿病对死亡率的影响，主要由既往糖尿病并发症驱动，而非单纯糖尿病诊断。这提示你管理 TBI 合并糖尿病患者时，需要评估其糖尿病并发症状态，进行精细化管理。
items.titleZh: 复杂糖尿病对严重创伤性脑损伤患者的影响
items.summaryZh: 这项研究假设，复杂糖尿病对严重创伤性脑损伤 (TBI) 患者的 TBI 后死亡率影响是严重程度依赖性的，由既往糖尿病并发症而非单纯糖尿病诊断驱动，并采用大型队列分析进行验证。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study hypothesizes that the impact of complicated diabetes mellitus on mortality after severe traumatic brain injury (TBI) is primarily driven by pre-existing diabetic complications, rather than the diagnosis of diabetes alone. This suggests that when managing TBI patients with diabetes, you need to assess their diabetic complication status for refined management.
items.limitation: 研究关注的是死亡率而非康复结局，对物理治疗实践的直接指导意义有限。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on mortality rather than rehabilitation outcomes, which has limited direct guidance for physical therapy practice.

items.title: Correction: ACTIVATE: physical activity assessment, prescription and promotion in clinical practice by healthcare professionals - a consensus study initiated by the International Federation of Sports Physical Therapy
items.summary: A correction notice for the "ACTIVATE" consensus study by the International Federation of Sports Physical Therapy indicates that reference 57 has been corrected in the online version.
items.curatedReason: 这是一则关于 IFSPT 启动的物理活动评估与促进共识研究的勘误，提醒你在引用该共识时核对最新版本，确保信息的准确性。
items.titleZh: 勘误：国际运动物理治疗联盟关于物理活动评估、处方和推广的共识研究
items.summaryZh: 国际运动物理治疗联盟（IFSPT）发起的“ACTIVATE”物理活动评估、处方与推广共识研究发布勘误，第 57 号参考文献已在线更正。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a correction for a consensus study on physical activity assessment and promotion initiated by IFSPT. When citing this consensus, ensure you refer to the latest version for accuracy.

items.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort
items.summary: This descriptive analysis aims to characterize the prevalence and risk factors for sexual dysfunction and its symptoms, including altered arousal, orgasmic dysfunction, female menstrual dysfunction, and male erectile and ejaculatory dysfunction, during primary spinal cord injury rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 脊髓损伤患者的性功能障碍是常见但常被忽视的问题。这份人口队列的描述性分析提醒你，在初级康复阶段就需要关注患者这方面的需求和风险因素，并将其纳入评估和干预计划。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤初级康复期间的性功能：一项基于人群队列的描述性分析
items.summaryZh: 这项描述性分析旨在阐明脊髓损伤初级康复期间性功能障碍及其症状（包括性唤起和性高潮障碍、女性月经失调以及男性勃起和射精功能障碍）的分布和风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Sexual dysfunction is a common but often overlooked issue in individuals with spinal cord injury. This descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort underscores the need to address patients' sexual health concerns and risk factors during primary rehabilitation, integrating them into assessment and intervention plans.
items.limitation: 本研究为描述性分析，无法建立因果关系，且未提供干预效果评估。
items.limitationEn: This descriptive analysis cannot establish causality and did not assess intervention effectiveness.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Multimodal Integration of Gait, Balance, and Infrared Thermography Enhances Machine-Learning Classification of Knee Osteoarthritis: A Cross-Sectional Study
items.summary: Combining gait, balance, and infrared thermography data significantly enhances machine-learning classification of knee osteoarthritis (KOA) compared to single-domain models, improving discrimination between KOA patients and healthy controls.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，结合步态、平衡和红外热成像数据，能显著提高膝关节骨关节炎（KOA）的机器学习分类准确性。这提示你未来在 KOA 评估中，可以考虑整合多模态生物力学和热成像信息，以更精准地识别和管理患者。
items.titleZh: 步态、平衡与红外热成像的多模态整合增强膝骨关节炎的机器学习分类：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究显示，结合步态、平衡和红外热成像数据，能显著提升膝关节骨关节炎（KOA）的机器学习分类能力，相比单一领域模型，更能有效区分 KOA 患者与健康对照。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that combining gait, balance, and infrared thermography data significantly improves machine-learning classification accuracy for knee osteoarthritis (KOA). This suggests that in future KOA assessments, you could consider integrating multi-modal biomechanical and thermal imaging information for more precise patient identification and management.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面研究，无法推断多模态整合对疾病进展或干预效果的预测能力。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional study, it cannot infer the predictive power of multimodal integration on disease progression or intervention efficacy.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Composite severity score for race-related incidents in cycling
items.summary: This paper proposes an incident-level severity framework for surveillance purposes in cycling, aiming to provide deeper insights into the relative severity of race incidents beyond traditional injury incidence and time-loss outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这份社论提出了一种用于自行车竞赛中种族相关事件的复合严重性评分框架，它能帮助你更全面地评估运动损伤的背景和后果，超越单一的诊断或时间损失指标。
items.titleZh: 自行车运动中竞赛相关事件的复合严重性评分
items.summaryZh: 本文提出了一种用于自行车运动中竞赛相关事件的事件级别严重性框架，旨在提供比传统损伤发生率和停赛时间结局更深入的相对严重性洞察。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial proposes a composite severity score framework for race-related incidents in cycling, which can help you more comprehensively assess the context and consequences of sports injuries, moving beyond single diagnostic or time-loss metrics.

items.title: Ready to respond? Safeguarding structures in European National Olympic Committees
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey of 20 European National Olympic Committees (NOCs) found that while 19/20 had safeguarding officers, most combined these roles, revealing systemic gaps in organizational readiness and case management for interpersonal violence.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对欧洲国家奥委会（NOCs）的调查揭示了运动组织在应对人际暴力方面的结构性缺口。你需要意识到，即使在有保障官的机构中，其职责往往与其他工作合并，这可能影响响应效率和案例管理能力。
items.titleZh: 准备好响应了吗？欧洲国家奥委会的保障结构
items.summaryZh: 一项对 20 个欧洲国家奥委会（NOCs）的横断面调查发现，19/20 的 NOCs 设有保障官，但大多数职责与其他工作合并，揭示了组织在应对人际暴力方面的结构性缺口和案例管理能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey of European National Olympic Committees (NOCs) reveals structural gaps in sports organizations' capacity to respond to interpersonal violence. You should be aware that even in organizations with safeguarding officers, their duties are often combined with other roles, which may affect response efficiency and case management capabilities.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于欧洲国家奥委会，结果的外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: The study is limited to European National Olympic Committees, restricting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Impact of heat exposure on muscle-tendon properties and mechanics (PhD Academy Award)
items.summary: PhD research explored the neuromuscular and musculotendinous system responses to different heat stress conditions (passive heat exposure, active heat exposure during running, and active heat acclimation), focusing on the gastrocnemius medialis muscle-tendon unit.
items.curatedReason: 这项 PhD 论文研究揭示了热暴露对神经肌肉和肌腱系统特性的影响。它提示你在训练或康复计划中，考虑不同热应激条件下（包括被动热暴露、运动中热暴露和热适应）肌腱单位的响应，尤其是对需要在高温环境下表现的运动员。
items.titleZh: 热暴露对肌肉-肌腱特性和力学的影响（博士学院奖）
items.summaryZh: 一项博士研究探讨了在不同热应激条件下（被动热暴露、跑步中主动热暴露和主动热适应）神经肌肉和肌腱系统的反应，重点关注小腿内侧腓肠肌肌腱单位的特性和力学。
items.curatedReasonEn: This PhD research reveals the impact of heat exposure on neuromuscular and musculotendinous system properties. It suggests that in training or rehabilitation programs, you should consider the responses of muscle-tendon units under different heat stress conditions (including passive heat exposure, heat exposure during exercise, and heat acclimation), especially for athletes performing in hot environments.
items.limitation: 研究主要集中在小腿内侧腓肠肌肌腱单位，结果对外推至其他肌肉群或全身可能存在局限。
items.limitationEn: The study primarily focused on the gastrocnemius medialis muscle-tendon unit, which may limit the generalizability of the findings to other muscle groups or the entire body.

items.title: #Beyondthelikes: the influence of social media on athletes mental health
items.summary: This editorial explores the dual impact of social media on athletes' mental health, discussing both the risks and opportunities of its use and exposure for young athletes' development and well-being.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论提醒你，社交媒体对青少年运动员的心理健康影响是双刃剑。在评估和支持年轻运动员时，你需要同时考虑社交媒体带来的风险和机遇，以促进其最佳发展和幸福感。
items.titleZh: #Beyondthelikes：社交媒体对运动员心理健康的影响
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论探讨了社交媒体对运动员心理健康的双重影响，讨论了其使用和暴露对年轻运动员发展与福祉的风险和机遇。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial highlights that social media's impact on adolescent athletes' mental health is a double-edged sword. When assessing and supporting young athletes, you need to consider both the risks and opportunities presented by social media to foster their optimal development and well-being.

items.title: Towards safer and smarter boxing: technology, health and performance
items.summary: This editorial discusses the need for boxing to adopt technology and data-driven approaches to manage head impacts and improve athlete safety, moving beyond current basic management strategies.
items.curatedReason: 社论指出拳击运动在运动员健康管理上面临的挑战。你作为康复专家，应关注如何结合技术和数据，从根本上改善对脑部冲击的监测和管理，而非仅依赖事后症状或基本现场措施。
items.titleZh: 迈向更安全更智能的拳击：技术、健康与表现
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论讨论了拳击运动需要采用技术和数据驱动的方法来管理头部冲击并提高运动员安全性，超越当前基本的管理策略。

items.title: Correction: Body composition and physical fitness in transgender versus cisgender individuals: a systematic review with meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review on body composition and physical fitness in transgender versus cisgender individuals has been corrected post-publication by removing three studies that did not meet eligibility criteria, although the main conclusions remain unchanged.
items.curatedReason: 注意，这项关于跨性别和顺性别个体身体成分与体能差异的系统综述已根据科学界的反馈进行了方法学修正，虽然主要结论未变，但仍提示你关注研究方法的严谨性。
items.titleZh: 更正：跨性别与顺性别个体身体成分和体能的系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项关于跨性别与顺性别个体身体成分和体能的系统综述与荟萃分析已发布更正，移除了三项不符合纳入标准的研究，但主要结论保持不变。
items.curatedReasonEn: Note that this systematic review on body composition and physical fitness differences between transgender and cisgender individuals has undergone methodological corrections based on scientific feedback. While the main conclusions remain unchanged, it still highlights the importance of rigorous research methodology.

items.title: "My aim is to contribute to a meaningful life." Experiences of physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain-a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study involving 8 physiotherapists found three categories describing their experiences treating children with cerebral palsy experiencing pain: facilitating wellbeing, embracing bodily experiences for pain interpretation, and building alliances based on safety and trust, while balancing emotional engagement and acknowledging treatment limitations.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了物理治疗师在处理脑瘫儿童疼痛时的复杂体验。它提醒你，在临床实践中，建立安全、信任的关系和理解身体体验对有效管理疼痛至关重要，同时也需认识到并非所有疼痛都能完全消除。
items.titleZh: “我的目标是让生活有意义。”物理治疗师治疗脑瘫儿童疼痛的经验——一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 8 位物理治疗师的定性研究发现，他们在治疗脑瘫儿童疼痛时有三类经验：通过身体治疗促进幸福感、将身体体验作为理解和治疗疼痛的起点，以及建立基于安全、信任和尊重的医患关系，同时要平衡情感和伦理投入，并认识到并非所有疼痛都能消除。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals the complex experiences of physiotherapists treating pain in children with cerebral palsy. It reminds you that in clinical practice, building safe, trusting relationships and understanding bodily experiences are crucial for effective pain management, while also acknowledging that not all pain can be completely eliminated.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小（8 名物理治疗师），结果可能不具有广泛代表性。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a small sample size (8 physiotherapists), and its findings may not be broadly representative.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: In a hospital-based study in Cameroon (N=94), only 38.3% of children with cerebral palsy accessed physiotherapy early (before 5 months) and 38.3% showed good adherence (≥50% sessions completed). Factors like home visits and caregiver education were positively associated with adherence.
items.curatedReason: 这项喀麦隆的研究显示，脑瘫儿童早期接受物理治疗和依从性普遍较低。这提示你在资源有限的环境中，需要关注提升早期干预的可及性和依从性策略，例如通过家访和家庭参与来改善结果。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期物理治疗的可及性和依从性：一项基于医院的研究
items.summaryZh: 喀麦隆一项基于医院的研究（N=94）显示，只有 38.3% 的脑瘫儿童在 5 个月前早期接受了物理治疗，且只有 38.3% 的儿童依从性良好（完成≥50%的治疗）。家访和看护者教育等因素与依从性呈正相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study from Cameroon shows low rates of early physiotherapy access and adherence among children with cerebral palsy. This suggests that in resource-limited settings, you need to focus on strategies to improve early intervention accessibility and adherence, such as home visits and family engagement, to improve outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心横断面研究，可能存在选择偏倚和回忆偏倚，结果外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center, cross-sectional study, potentially subject to selection and recall bias, limiting generalizability.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: An exploratory observational study examined pediatric physiotherapists' use of focus of attention (FOA) during telehealth for neurodevelopmental disorders, finding that both internal and external FOA were used, but external FOA was less frequent.
items.curatedReason: 远程儿童神经发育障碍康复中，内部和外部注意力焦点（FOA）都在使用，但外部 FOA 频率较低。这意味着你需要在远程治疗时，更有意识地设计外部 FOA 指导，以提高运动学习效率。
items.titleZh: 远程物理治疗中注意力焦点在指令和反馈中的应用：一项观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性观察研究调查了儿科物理治疗师在对神经发育障碍患儿进行远程治疗时，如何使用注意力焦点（FOA）来提供指令和反馈，发现内外部 FOA 均有使用，但外部 FOA 频率较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: In telerehabilitation for pediatric neurodevelopmental disorders, both internal and external focus of attention (FOA) are used, but external FOA is less frequent. This suggests you need to more consciously design external FOA cues during telehealth to improve motor learning effectiveness.
items.limitation: 本研究为小样本探索性观察研究（6 名物理治疗师），结果可能不具普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This was a small exploratory observational study (6 physiotherapists), so the findings may not be generalizable.

items.title: Validating an Activity Monitor for Acute Care Patients: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT).
items.summary: The Patient Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT) activity monitor was validated in 46 hospitalized patients and 10 healthy older adults, demonstrating high accuracy (ICC ≥ 0.90) for stride length, steps, stepping time, sedentary time, and activity time when compared to video truth data.
items.curatedReason: 这款名为 PREEMPT 的活动监测器在急性期患者中显示出良好验证性。这提示你可以考虑将此类设备引入临床，以便更客观地评估住院患者的移动性和活动水平，为康复方案提供量化依据。
items.titleZh: 验证急性期患者活动监测器：患者/居民移动追踪器 (PREEMPT)
items.summaryZh: 患者/居民移动追踪器 (PREEMPT) 活动监测器在 46 名住院患者和 10 名健康老年人中进行了验证，与视频真实数据相比，在步长、步数、步进时间、久坐时间和活动时间方面均表现出高准确性（ICC ≥ 0.90）。
items.curatedReasonEn: The PREEMPT activity monitor demonstrated good validation in acute care patients. This suggests you might consider incorporating such devices into clinical practice for more objective assessment of mobility and activity levels in hospitalized patients, providing quantitative data for rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 验证队列相对较小（46 名住院患者），且部分结局（如步态参数）可能需要更精确的参考标准。
items.limitationEn: The validation cohort was relatively small (46 hospitalized patients), and some outcomes (e.g., gait parameters) might require more precise reference standards.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: An RCT (N=166 cancer survivors) found that 8 weeks of exercise-based telerehabilitation was safe but not superior to a single in-person assessment and advice session for improving health-related quality of life (mean difference in FACT-G score: 0.8, 95% CI -1.9 to 3.5).
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 显示，基于运动的肿瘤远程康复虽然安全，但在改善生活质量方面并不优于单次物理治疗评估和建议。这意味着在资源分配和患者选择时，你应权衡远程方案的便捷性与单次面诊的直接效果，尤其对于生活质量改善这一核心指标。
items.titleZh: 基于运动的肿瘤远程康复是安全的，但改善生活质量方面不优于单次物理治疗：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项对 166 名癌症幸存者的随机对照试验发现，8 周基于运动的远程康复是安全的，但在改善健康相关生活质量方面不优于单次面对面评估和建议（FACT-G 评分平均差：0.8，95% CI -1.9 至 3.5）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation, though safe, is not superior to a single in-person physiotherapy assessment and advice session for improving quality of life. This means you should weigh the convenience of telerehabilitation against the direct impact of a single in-person consultation, especially for the core outcome of quality of life, when allocating resources and selecting patients.
items.limitation: 研究未详细报告远程组的依从性数据，这可能影响干预的实际效果。
items.limitationEn: The study did not detail adherence data for the telerehabilitation group, which could affect the actual intervention effectiveness.

items.title: Infographic. Video analysis of muscle strains in sport: qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics across muscle groups
items.summary: An infographic on video analysis of muscle strains in sport emphasizes understanding qualitative (contact mechanisms, activities, joint movements) and quantitative (joint angles, timing) situational characteristics for effective injury prevention and rehabilitation strategies.
items.curatedReason: 这张信息图强调了视频分析在理解运动中肌肉拉伤机制的重要性。它提示你，在评估和预防运动损伤时，可以考虑利用视频分析工具，更精细地识别损伤发生的具体情境特征（如接触机制、关节角度），从而制定更精准的干预策略。
items.titleZh: 信息图：运动中肌肉拉伤的视频分析：各肌群的定性和定量情境特征
items.summaryZh: 一张关于运动中肌肉拉伤视频分析的信息图强调，理解定性（接触机制、活动、关节运动）和定量（关节角度、发生时间）情境特征对于制定有效的损伤预防和康复策略至关重要。
items.curatedReasonEn: This infographic highlights the importance of video analysis in understanding muscle strain mechanisms in sports. It suggests that when assessing and preventing sports injuries, you can consider using video analysis tools to more precisely identify specific situational characteristics of injury occurrence (e.g., contact mechanisms, joint angles), thereby developing more targeted intervention strategies.

items.title: Individual Prognostication of Emergence from Post-Traumatic Amnesia: A Nationwide Cohort Study
items.summary: A nationwide cohort study aims to develop an individual prognostication model for emergence from post-traumatic amnesia (PTA) in patients with moderate to severe traumatic brain injury (TBI).
items.curatedReason: 对于中重度 TBI 患者，该研究旨在建立一个预测创伤后遗忘症（PTA）恢复的模型。这会让你在向患者家属解释预后时更有依据，并能更好地规划康复介入的时间点。
items.titleZh: 创伤后遗忘症恢复的个体化预测：一项全国性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项全国性队列研究旨在开发一个预测中重度创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者创伤后遗忘症（PTA）恢复的个体化预测模型。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients with moderate to severe TBI, this study aims to develop a model predicting emergence from post-traumatic amnesia (PTA). This will give you a stronger basis when explaining prognoses to families and allow for better timing of rehabilitation interventions.
items.limitation: 队列研究存在潜在的混杂因素，且模型预测的准确性在不同人群中可能有所差异。
items.limitationEn: Cohort studies have potential confounders, and model prediction accuracy may vary across different populations.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Do blood flow restriction exercises offer additional benefits when compared to conventional exercises in musculoskeletal rehabilitation? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis found that low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (LLE-BFR) offers additional benefits over low-load exercise (LLE) alone for muscle strength, pain, and disability in musculoskeletal conditions, though direct comparison to high-load exercise (HLE) was also evaluated.
items.curatedReason: 对于肌肉骨骼康复，血流限制训练（BFR）与低负荷训练结合，在肌肉力量、疼痛和残疾方面均优于单纯低负荷训练。当你考虑给患者增加力量和减轻疼痛时，BFR是一个值得优先考虑的有效补充方案。
items.titleZh: 血流限制训练是否在肌肉骨骼康复中比常规训练提供额外益处？一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，在肌肉骨骼疾病中，低负荷血流限制训练（LLE-BFR）在肌肉力量、疼痛和残疾方面优于单纯低负荷训练（LLE），尽管也评估了与高负荷训练（HLE）的直接比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: For musculoskeletal rehabilitation, blood flow restriction (BFR) exercise combined with low-load exercise is superior to low-load exercise alone in terms of muscle strength, pain, and disability. When aiming to improve strength and reduce pain, BFR is an effective complementary strategy worth prioritizing.
items.limitation: 具体效应量和高负荷运动的对比结果，摘要中未明确给出。
items.limitationEn: Specific effect sizes and comparative results with high-load exercise were not explicitly provided in the abstract.

items.title: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summary: A randomized controlled study found high agreement in diagnosis, treatment, and discharge decisions between physiotherapists and resident physicians compared to senior physicians for musculoskeletal conditions in an emergency department setting.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究支持了高级物理治疗师（APP）在急诊科诊断和治疗肌肉骨骼疾病的有效性。在执业中，你可以利用这一证据来推动APP角色的扩展，以缓解全科医生和急诊科的压力。
items.titleZh: 急诊一线对肌肉骨骼功能障碍的诊断和治疗一致性：一项前瞻性、随机对照研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照研究发现，在急诊科环境中，物理治疗师和住院医师在肌肉骨骼疾病的诊断、治疗和出院决策方面与高级医师具有高度一致性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study supports the effectiveness of Advanced Physiotherapy Practitioners (APPs) in diagnosing and treating musculoskeletal dysfunctions in the emergency department. In practice, you can leverage this evidence to advocate for the expansion of APP roles to alleviate pressure on general practitioners and emergency departments.
items.limitation: 研究仅在一家医院急诊科进行，结果的外推性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: The study was conducted in a single hospital emergency department, which may limit the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Quantifying Physical Activity Through Step Count Estimation Across Multiple Wearable Sensor Configurations: A Validation Study in Post-Stroke and Healthy Adults.
items.summary: A validation study involving 18 post-stroke and 18 healthy adults compared the accuracy of stride count estimation across multiple wearable sensor configurations (wrists, hips, ankles) and algorithms against a gold-standard instrumented treadmill.
items.curatedReason: 这次的验证研究提示，不同可穿戴设备配置在卒中患者和健康成人中的步数估计准确性存在差异。在选择可穿戴设备进行步数测量时，你需要注意其局限性，尤其是在特定患者群体中。
items.titleZh: 通过多重可穿戴传感器配置量化身体活动步数估计：一项针对卒中后患者和健康成年人的验证研究
items.summaryZh: 一项验证研究比较了18名卒中后患者和18名健康成年人，在多种可穿戴传感器配置（手腕、臀部、脚踝）和算法下步数估计的准确性，并与金标准器械跑台进行对照。
items.curatedReasonEn: This validation study suggests that step count estimation accuracy varies across different wearable sensor configurations in post-stroke and healthy adults. When selecting wearables for step count measurement, be mindful of their limitations, especially in specific patient populations.
items.limitation: 样本量相对较小，可能不足以覆盖所有卒中后个体的步态变异性。
items.limitationEn: The relatively small sample size may not be sufficient to cover the full variability of gait in all post-stroke individuals.

items.title: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summary: Researchers developed a core set of nine patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy, grouped into functioning, distress, and context domains, suitable for daily practice, research, and quality assessment.
items.curatedReason: 儿童物理治疗的核心患者报告结局（PRO）及其测量工具（PROM）已初步确立，涵盖功能、痛苦和情境三个领域。在儿科临床实践中，你可以将其作为标准化的评估框架，更好地捕捉患儿及其家庭的视角，辅助制定治疗计划。
items.titleZh: 儿童物理治疗核心患者报告结局（测量）集的开发
items.summaryZh: 研究人员为儿童物理治疗开发了一套包含九个核心患者报告结局（PROs）及其测量工具（PROMs），分为功能、痛苦和情境三个领域，适用于日常实践、研究和质量评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: A core set of patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) has been provisionally established for pediatric physical therapy, covering functioning, distress, and context. In pediatric clinical practice, you can use this as a standardized assessment framework to better capture the perspectives of children and their families, aiding in treatment planning.
items.limitation: PROMs的选择仅限于已验证工具，可能未涵盖所有重要的PROs。
items.limitationEn: The selection of PROMs was limited to validated tools, which might not cover all important PROs.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement.
items.summary: A difference-in-differences analysis of 62,217 Medicare beneficiaries in the US found that the mandatory Comprehensive Care for Joint Replacement (CJR) bundled payment model significantly reduced the proportion of hospitals delivering prehabilitation for lower extremity joint replacement.
items.curatedReason: 强制性捆绑支付模式（如美国CJR）显著减少了择期下肢关节置换术前的康复（prehabilitation）服务。在美国执业的PT需要意识到这种支付模式对前期康复服务利用率的负面影响，并重新评估你的服务交付模式和收费策略。
items.titleZh: 强制性捆绑支付对下肢关节置换术前康复服务交付的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项对美国62,217名Medicare受益人进行的差异中差异分析发现，强制性综合关节置换护理（CJR）捆绑支付模式显著降低了提供下肢关节置换术前康复服务的医院比例。
items.curatedReasonEn: Mandatory bundled payment models (such as CJR in the US) significantly reduced prehabilitation services for elective lower extremity joint replacement. PTs practicing in the US need to be aware of the negative impact of these payment models on the utilization of prehabilitation services and re-evaluate your service delivery and billing strategies.
items.limitation: 研究基于Medicare受益人的索赔数据，结果可能不完全适用于所有支付方或人群。
items.limitationEn: The study is based on Medicare beneficiary claims data, and the results may not be fully applicable to all payers or populations.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement

items.title: Identifying Gaps in Rehabilitation Strategies for Chronic Stroke: A Systematic Review of Evidence in Patients With and Without Nerve Transfer.
items.summary: A systematic review identified gaps in rehabilitation strategies for chronic stroke upper limb impairment, comparing outcomes and protocols between patients with and without contralateral C7 (CC7) nerve transfer and technology-assisted rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述强调，慢性卒中上肢康复在神经转移手术与非手术路径之间，康复方案的剂量、内容和交付模式存在证据空白。在实践中，你需要关注这些证据差异，并推动更多比较研究，以便为患者提供更精准的个性化康复策略。
items.titleZh: 识别慢性卒中康复策略的空白：一项针对神经转移患者和非神经转移患者证据的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述识别了慢性卒中上肢功能障碍康复策略中的空白，比较了接受对侧C7（CC7）神经转移手术患者与未接受手术患者以及技术辅助康复的结局和方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review highlights evidence gaps in rehabilitation dosage, content, and delivery models between nerve transfer surgery and non-surgical pathways for chronic stroke upper limb rehabilitation. In practice, you need to be aware of these evidence disparities and advocate for more comparative research to provide patients with more precise, personalized rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的异质性，以及康复方案缺乏标准化，可能影响结论的统一性。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity among included studies and lack of standardization in rehabilitation protocols may affect the consistency of conclusions.

items.title: Mental health in tennis: a cross-organisational hybrid summit-Delphi consensus process
items.summary: A multi-method study, combining an in-person summit and a Delphi consensus process with 83 participants from various tennis governing bodies and the broader tennis ecosystem, generated recommendations for mental healthcare and mental wellness promotion among elite and junior tennis athletes.
items.curatedReason: 这项由 83 位专家参与的共识研究，针对网球运动员（包括青少年和精英）的心理健康护理和促进给出了建议。你可以参考这些专家共识，将相关策略整合到你的运动康复方案中，以提供更全面的心理支持。
items.titleZh: 网球运动中的心理健康：一项跨组织混合峰会-德尔菲共识过程
items.summaryZh: 一项多方法研究，结合了面对面峰会和德尔菲共识过程，汇集了来自网球管理机构和生态系统的83名参与者，为精英和青少年网球运动员的心理健康护理和促进提供了建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This consensus study provides recommendations for mental health care and promotion among tennis athletes, including junior and elite players. In sports rehabilitation, you can refer to these cross-organizational expert consensuses and apply them to your service design to more comprehensively support athletes' mental well-being.
items.limitation: 德尔菲共识过程可能受到专家组成员主观判断的影响。
items.limitationEn: The Delphi consensus process might be influenced by the subjective judgments of the expert panel members.

items.title: Prevalence, Patterns, Treatment Outcomes and Costs of Physiotherapy-Managed Musculoskeletal Disorders in Nigeria.
items.summary: A 10-year retrospective study of 1582 patients in Nigeria found that physiotherapy effectively managed musculoskeletal disorders, with detailed data on prevalence, treatment patterns, and costs.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了尼日利亚肌肉骨骼疾病物理治疗的流行病学、模式和成本效益数据。在临床实践中，你可以用这些数据来评估当地需求，并据此优化资源分配和治疗方案。
items.titleZh: 尼日利亚物理治疗管理的肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、模式、治疗结果和成本
items.summaryZh: 一项对尼日利亚1582名患者进行的长达十年的回顾性研究显示，物理治疗有效管理了肌肉骨骼疾病，并提供了患病率、治疗模式和成本的详细数据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study provides epidemiological, pattern, and cost-effectiveness data on physiotherapy for musculoskeletal disorders in Nigeria. In clinical practice, you can use this data to assess local needs and optimize resource allocation and treatment protocols accordingly.
items.limitation: 研究为回顾性设计，可能存在数据缺失和选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The study's retrospective design may be subject to missing data and selection bias.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Building the foundations: organisational leadership for athlete mental health
items.summary: A commentary emphasizes the critical role of organizational leadership in athlete mental health, advocating for a shift from reactive crisis response to proactive prevention and promotion to address the high prevalence of mental health symptoms among elite athletes and support staff.
items.curatedReason: 这项评论强调了在运动员心理健康方面，组织领导力的重要性，应从被动应对危机转向主动预防和促进。在运动康复领域，你需要认识到心理健康是整体健康的重要组成部分，并与团队共同构建支持性的环境，以减少求助障碍。
items.titleZh: 奠定基础：运动员心理健康的组织领导力
items.summaryZh: 一项评论强调了组织领导力在运动员心理健康中的关键作用，主张从被动危机应对转向积极预防和促进，以解决精英运动员和支持人员中普遍存在的心理健康问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary highlights the importance of organizational leadership in athlete mental health, advocating for a shift from reactive crisis response to proactive prevention and promotion. In sports rehabilitation, you need to recognize mental health as an integral component of overall well-being and collaborate with your team to build a supportive environment that reduces barriers to seeking help.

items.title: An mHealth intervention based on behavior change techniques to promote physical activity and nutrition in older patients with cancer: protocol for an N-of-1 trial
items.summary: This N-of-1 trial protocol outlines an mHealth intervention using an ABA' design to promote physical activity and nutritional behaviors in older patients with cancer, combining ecological momentary assessment and accelerometry to capture temporal dynamics of psychological and behavioral processes.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项 N-of-1 试验方案，并非干预效果的定论。尽管采用了 ABA' 设计，但该研究仍在探索 mHealth 干预对老年癌症患者身体活动和营养行为的潜在影响。在结果公布前，不建议直接采纳其干预模式。
items.titleZh: 基于行为改变技术的移动健康干预以促进老年癌症患者的身体活动和营养：一项N-of-1试验方案
items.summaryZh: 这项N-of-1试验方案概述了一项基于ABA'设计的移动健康干预，旨在促进老年癌症患者的身体活动和营养行为，结合生态瞬时评估和加速度计以捕捉心理和行为过程的时间动态。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is an N-of-1 trial protocol, not a definitive statement on intervention efficacy. While using an ABA' design, this study is still exploring the potential impact of mHealth interventions on physical activity and nutritional behaviors in older cancer patients. Do not adopt its intervention model until results are published.
items.limitation: 这是一项协议研究，尚未公布实际结果。
items.limitationEn: This is a protocol study, and actual results have not yet been published.

items.title: Incomplete Cognitive Assessment in Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation: Recovering Clinically Interpretable Relationships from Routine Neuropsychological Data.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 2654 post-acute stroke patients found that incomplete routine neuropsychological data can still yield clinically interpretable relationships among cognitive, clinical, and contextual variables, supporting group-level stratification.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，即使卒中后康复中的认知评估不完整，仍能从中提取有临床意义的关系。在日常实践中，你可以利用现有数据进行认知功能分组和初步评估，同时也要意识到其局限性。
items.titleZh: 急性期后卒中康复中不完整的认知评估：从常规神经心理学数据中恢复临床可解释的关系
items.summaryZh: 一项针对2654名急性期后卒中患者的回顾性队列研究发现，即使是常规神经心理学数据不完整，仍能从中提取出认知、临床和情境变量之间具有临床可解释性的关系，支持了群体分层。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that even incomplete cognitive assessments in post-stroke rehabilitation can yield clinically interpretable relationships. In daily practice, you can use existing data for cognitive functional grouping and preliminary assessments, while also recognizing their limitations.
items.limitation: 研究为回顾性设计，存在数据不完整性，可能影响结果的代表性。
items.limitationEn: The study has a retrospective design with incomplete data, which may affect the representativeness of the results.

items.title: Figure-of-Eight Taping Combined with Rehabilitation for Multidirectional Shoulder Instability in a School-Age Female Karate Athlete: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report describes the effective use of figure-of-eight taping combined with rehabilitation to facilitate exercise therapy for multidirectional shoulder instability in a 12-year-old female karate athlete.
items.curatedReason: 这个病例报告展示了八字形贴扎如何辅助治疗多方向肩关节不稳。在复杂病例中，你可以考虑将贴扎作为一种工具来促进患者进行主动运动训练。
items.titleZh: 八字形贴扎联合康复治疗学龄期女性空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳一例报告
items.summaryZh: 一份病例报告描述了八字形贴扎联合康复训练如何有效促进一名12岁女性空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳的运动治疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report illustrates how figure-of-eight taping can assist in treating multidirectional shoulder instability. In complex cases, you might consider taping as a tool to facilitate active exercise therapy.
items.limitation: 本研究为单病例报告，证据等级低，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case report with a low level of evidence and limited generalizability.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Effects of physical exercise on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis: A systematic review.
items.summary: A systematic review analyzed the effectiveness of different physical exercise interventions on spasticity in people with multiple sclerosis, including randomized controlled trials with EDSS scores ≤6.0.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述明确了不同物理运动干预对多发性硬化症痉挛的影响。你可以参考综述结论，为 MS 患者的痉挛管理选择更有效的运动策略。
items.titleZh: 体育锻炼对多发性硬化症患者痉挛影响的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述分析了不同体育锻炼干预对多发性硬化症患者痉挛的影响，纳入了 EDSS 评分 ≤6.0 的随机对照试验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review clarifies the effects of various physical exercise interventions on spasticity in multiple sclerosis. Refer to its conclusions to select more effective exercise strategies for managing spasticity in MS patients.
items.limitation: 由于研究设计异质性，本综述采用叙述性综合分析，未进行荟萃分析。
items.limitationEn: Due to heterogeneity in study designs, this review used narrative synthesis instead of meta-analysis.

items.title: Follow up to the 2018 IOC consensus statement on paediatric ACL injuries: towards a broader vision of care
items.summary: A follow-up to the 2018 IOC consensus statement on pediatric ACL injuries provides an updated vision of care, examining recent advances, current evidence, and persistent challenges in prevention, individualized management, evolving surgical strategies, and long-term holistic care.
items.curatedReason: 这份国际奥委会共识声明的后续报告，拓宽了儿童 ACL 损伤的护理视角。你需要更新对儿童 ACL 损伤预防、个体化管理和长期整体护理的理解，将其纳入你的临床实践考量。
items.titleZh: 2018 年国际奥委会儿童 ACL 损伤共识声明的后续：迈向更广阔的护理视野
items.summaryZh: 2018 年国际奥委会儿童 ACL 损伤共识声明的后续报告，提供了更新的护理愿景，审视了预防、个体化管理、不断发展的手术策略和长期整体护理方面的最新进展、现有证据和持续挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This follow-up to the IOC consensus statement broadens the perspective on pediatric ACL injury care. Update your understanding of pediatric ACL injury prevention, individualized management, and long-term holistic care, integrating these into your clinical practice considerations.

items.title: Prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating in athletes: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis estimated the prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating among athletes across various training levels and assessment methods, identifying moderators associated with these prevalence estimates.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述明确了运动员饮食失调和紊乱性饮食的患病率及相关调节因素。这些发现是评估和识别高风险运动员的坚实依据，你应立即将其整合到你的筛查流程和干预策略中。
items.titleZh: 运动员饮食失调和紊乱性饮食的患病率：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析估计了不同训练水平和评估方法下运动员饮食失调和紊乱性饮食的患病率，并识别了与患病率估计相关的调节因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review clearly defines the prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating among athletes, along with associated moderators. These findings provide a robust basis for assessing and identifying at-risk athletes, and you should immediately integrate them into your screening protocols and intervention strategies.
items.limitation: 由于不同研究的评估方法和训练水平存在异质性，可能影响患病率估计的精确性。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity in assessment methods and training levels across studies may affect the precision of prevalence estimates.

items.title: Subtype-specific optimal cut-off values of the Berg Balance Scale for predicting independent walking in inpatient stroke rehabilitation: a multicentre cohort study.
items.summary: A multicenter retrospective cohort study of 565 stroke patients determined the independent predictive value of admission Berg Balance Scale scores for independent walking at discharge and derived subtype-specific optimal cut-off values for ischemic and hemorrhagic stroke.
items.curatedReason: 入院时的 Berg 平衡量表评分确实是卒中患者出院时独立行走能力的有效预测指标。在对缺血性（56.5分）和出血性（54.5分）卒中患者进行评估时，可直接使用本研究提供的亚型特异性最佳截点值，这将极大提高你的预测精度。
items.titleZh: 住院卒中康复中 Berg 平衡量表预测独立行走能力的亚型特异性最佳截点值：一项多中心队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 565 名卒中患者的多中心回顾性队列研究确定了入院 Berg 平衡量表评分对出院时独立行走能力的独立预测价值，并推导了缺血性和出血性卒中亚型的最佳截点值。
items.curatedReasonEn: Admission Berg Balance Scale scores are indeed an effective predictor for independent walking ability at discharge in stroke patients. You can directly use the subtype-specific optimal cut-off values provided by this study—56.5 for ischemic and 54.5 for hemorrhagic stroke—to significantly improve your predictive accuracy during assessment.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，可能存在数据收集偏差，且结果主要基于韩国人群，外推至其他人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective cohort study may have data collection biases, and findings are primarily based on a Korean population, so generalization to other populations should be cautious.

items.title: Incidence of injury and illness at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games: post-pandemic trends and sport-specific risks
items.summary: A prospective surveillance study at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games monitored 4450 athletes, reporting 535 injuries (prevalence 10.9%) with an incidence of 8.6 per 1000 athlete days, identifying taekwondo (27.3) and football 5-a-side (22.3) as high-risk sports.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究描述了 2024 年巴黎残奥会伤病和疾病的流行病学特征。这能让你了解残疾运动员在高水平竞技中的伤病风险和模式，指导预防和干预策略。
items.titleZh: 2024 年巴黎残奥会伤病发生率：疫情后趋势和运动特异性风险
items.summaryZh: 一项在 2024 年巴黎残奥会进行的前瞻性监测研究，共监测 4450 名运动员，报告了 535 例伤病（患病率 10.9%），发生率为每千名运动员日 8.6，跆拳道（27.3）和五人制足球（22.3）被识别为高风险运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study describes the epidemiology of injuries and illnesses at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games. Use this to understand injury risks and patterns in elite para-athletes, guiding prevention and intervention strategies.
items.limitation: 本研究为描述性流行病学，未能提供伤病与特定干预或预防措施之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This descriptive epidemiological study does not provide causal relationships between injuries/illnesses and specific interventions or preventive measures.

items.title: GaitEncoder: A Foundation Model of Gait Kinematics for Diverse Clinical Applications and Pathologies
items.summary: GaitEncoder is a generative foundation model of walking kinematics that integrates eight gait datasets (65,000+ recordings) to enable various downstream clinical tasks across diverse patient populations using smartphone video-based gait analysis.
items.curatedReason: GaitEncoder 模型旨在通过深度学习赋能步态运动学分析，支持临床决策。虽然仍是预印本，但该技术展示了将移动传感集成到康复实践中的潜力，值得你持续关注。
items.titleZh: GaitEncoder：一个用于多种临床应用和病理的步态运动学基础模型
items.summaryZh: GaitEncoder 是一个步态运动学生成式基础模型，它整合了八个步态数据集（超过 65,000 条记录），旨在通过基于智能手机视频的步态分析，支持多种临床应用和不同患者群体的下游任务。
items.curatedReasonEn: The GaitEncoder model aims to empower gait kinematics analysis through deep learning to support clinical decision-making. Though still a preprint, this technology demonstrates the potential for integrating mobile sensing into rehabilitation practice and warrants your continued attention.
items.limitation: 该研究为预印本，尚未经过同行评审，且模型在真实世界临床应用中的验证和推广仍需时间。
items.limitationEn: This study is a preprint and has not yet undergone peer review; model validation and implementation in real-world clinical applications will take time.

items.title: Exploration of lifestyle interventions for individuals with knee osteoarthritis: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified 36 studies (29 RCTs) on lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis, exploring their range, characteristics, and outcomes, as well as the assessment measures used.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述梳理了膝骨关节炎生活方式干预的广度、特征及结果，并识别了评估中使用的结局测量指标。这能帮你掌握当前膝骨关节炎非药物干预的全景。
items.titleZh: 膝骨关节炎患者生活方式干预的探索性范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别了 36 项关于膝骨关节炎生活方式干预的研究（包括 29 项随机对照试验），探索了这些干预的范围、特征和结局，以及所使用的评估测量指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review provides an overview of the scope, characteristics, and outcomes of lifestyle interventions for knee OA, identifying key outcome measures. Use this to understand the current landscape of non-pharmacological interventions for knee OA.
items.limitation: 该综述纳入了多种研究设计，因此证据等级异质。
items.limitationEn: The review included various study designs, leading to heterogeneous evidence levels.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Physical therapy protocols for patients with a megaprosthesis after bone tumor resection.
items.summary: Physical therapy protocols for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection were developed through an explorative literature search and consensus procedures involving orthopedic oncologic surgeons and physical therapists, focusing on six different megaprostheses.
items.curatedReason: 这份共识协议提供了骨肿瘤切除并大段假体置换术后患者的物理治疗方案。这为你处理这类复杂病例提供了结构化的实践框架。
items.titleZh: 骨肿瘤切除后大段假体置换患者的物理治疗方案
items.summaryZh: 通过探索性文献检索和骨科肿瘤外科医生及物理治疗师的共识程序，制定了骨肿瘤切除后大段假体置换患者的物理治疗方案，涵盖六种不同类型的大段假体。
items.curatedReasonEn: This consensus protocol offers structured physical therapy guidelines for patients post-bone tumor resection with megaprosthesis reconstruction. Use it to inform your management of these complex cases.
items.limitation: 共识协议基于专家意见和单中心初步实践。
items.limitationEn: The consensus protocol is based on expert opinions and initial single-center practice.

items.title: Effects of spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions on spatiotemporal gait parameters in stroke patients: A within-subject repeated-measures study.
items.summary: In 27 stroke patients, a within-subject repeated-measures study investigated the effects of spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions on spatiotemporal gait parameters compared to a no-prioritization condition.
items.curatedReason: 本研究提示，对于卒中患者，空间优先和时间优先的口头指令对步态参数有不同影响。在优化步态对称性时，你应考虑这两种指令的差异化应用，但鉴于样本量较小，还需更多研究验证。
items.titleZh: 空间和时间优先口头指令对卒中患者时空步态参数影响的研究
items.summaryZh: 一项自身对照重复测量研究在 27 名卒中患者中，比较了空间优先和时间优先的口头指令对时空步态参数的影响，并与无优先条件的步态进行对照。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that spatial and temporal prioritized verbal instructions differently affect gait parameters in stroke patients. When optimizing gait symmetry, consider the nuanced application of these two types of instructions, but given the small sample size, further validation is needed.
items.limitation: 研究设计为自身对照重复测量，且样本量较小（27例卒中患者），结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study design is a within-subject repeated-measures with a small sample size (27 stroke patients), limiting generalizability.

items.title: Feasibility of Integrating Music Therapy into Routine Speech-Language Rehabilitation for Post-Stroke Aphasia: A Real-World Outpatient Study.
items.summary: A quasi-experimental study investigated the feasibility of integrating a structured music therapy protocol into conventional speech-language therapy for post-stroke aphasia in an outpatient setting in Thailand.
items.curatedReason: 将音乐疗法整合到卒中失语症常规言语康复中是可行的，且本研究在泰国门诊环境中进行了初步探索。这为你的跨学科干预提供了方向，但仍处于可行性阶段，不应立即全面推广。
items.titleZh: 整合音乐疗法到卒中后失语症常规言语康复的可行性：一项真实世界门诊研究
items.summaryZh: 一项准实验研究在泰国门诊言语治疗诊所进行，旨在探讨将结构化音乐疗法方案整合到卒中后失语症常规言语-语言治疗中的可行性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Integrating music therapy into conventional speech-language therapy for post-stroke aphasia appears feasible, as explored in this preliminary study in a Thai outpatient setting. This offers a direction for your interdisciplinary interventions but is still in the feasibility stage and should not be broadly adopted yet.
items.limitation: 本研究为准实验设计，而非随机对照试验，且实验组增加了总体治疗接触时间，可能存在混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This quasi-experimental study, not an RCT, increased overall therapeutic contact time in the experimental group, which may introduce confounding factors.

items.title: Monitoring an athletes performance-state after they return to sport is a significant challenge in ACL injury research and applied practice
items.summary: Monitoring an athlete's performance state after returning to sport following an ACL injury remains a significant challenge in research and applied practice, despite extensive focus on return-to-sport testing.
items.curatedReason: 这篇文章指出，运动员 ACL 损伤后重返赛场后的表现状态监测是一个重要挑战。这提醒你在关注复训标准的同时，也要重视长期表现监测和风险管理。
items.titleZh: ACL 损伤运动员重返赛场后表现状态的监测是研究和实践中的一项重大挑战
items.summaryZh: 尽管重返赛场测试备受关注，但 ACL 损伤运动员在重返赛场后对其表现状态的监测在研究和实践中仍是一项重大挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article highlights that monitoring an athlete's performance state after returning to sport following an ACL injury is a significant challenge. This reminds you to prioritize long-term performance monitoring and risk management alongside return-to-training criteria.

items.title: Factors associated with return-to-sport outcomes following pathogen-confirmed acute respiratory infections in athletes: AWARE X study
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 114 athletes with confirmed acute respiratory infections identified factors associated with return-to-sport outcomes, including median days to return-to-training (3.5 days), return-to-full-training (8 days), and return-to-full-performance (11 days).
items.curatedReason: 对于急性呼吸道感染的运动员，你现在有更具体的重返运动时间参考：中位数数据显示重返训练约 3.5 天，重返完全训练约 8 天，重返完全表现约 11 天。利用这些数据，可以为你的运动员提供更准确的预期管理和恢复计划。
items.titleZh: 运动员病原体确诊急性呼吸道感染后重返运动结局的相关因素：AWARE X 研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 114 名确诊急性呼吸道感染运动员的前瞻性队列研究，识别了与重返运动结局相关的因素，包括重返训练（中位数 3.5 天）、重返完全训练（8 天）和重返完全表现（11 天）的时间。
items.curatedReasonEn: For athletes with acute respiratory infections, you now have more specific return-to-sport timelines: median data suggests return-to-training around 3.5 days, return-to-full-training around 8 days, and return-to-full-performance around 11 days. Use these numbers to provide more accurate expectation management and recovery planning for your athletes.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量为 114 例急性呼吸道感染病例，结果可能受特定病原体和疾病严重程度分布影响。
items.limitationEn: With a sample size of 114 acute respiratory infection cases, the results may be influenced by the distribution of specific pathogens and illness severity.

items.title: Physiotherapists' knowledge, attitude and practice of motor learning in stroke rehabilitation.
items.summary: A survey of 40 South African physiotherapists described their knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding motor learning in stroke rehabilitation, utilizing convenient and snowball sampling techniques.
items.curatedReason: 这项调查反映了南非物理治疗师在卒中康复中对运动学习的知识、态度和实践情况。这能让你了解不同区域的临床实践现状。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师在卒中康复中运动学习的知识、态度和实践
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 40 名南非物理治疗师的调查描述了他们在卒中康复中关于运动学习的知识、态度和实践，该调查采用了便利抽样和滚雪球抽样技术。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey details South African physiotherapists' knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding motor learning in stroke rehabilitation. Use it to understand regional variations in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为小样本横断面调查，仅代表南非部分物理治疗师的观点，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a small-sample, cross-sectional survey representing only a subset of South African physiotherapists, limiting generalizability.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: The effectiveness of cardiovascular rehabilitation for transient ischaemic attack and mild stroke: A randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: This RCT (n=140) found that a 6-week cardiovascular rehabilitation program significantly improved functional exercise capacity (6MWTD, moderate effect size) and physical activity levels over 6 months in TIA and mild stroke patients compared to usual care.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 证据表明，针对短暂性脑缺血发作 (TIA) 和轻度卒中患者的综合心血管康复，在 6 个月内能显著改善功能性运动能力、身体活动水平。这是你将这类患者纳入心血管康复计划的有力支持。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验（n=140）发现，与常规治疗相比，针对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的为期 6 周心血管康复计划，在 6 个月内能显著改善功能性运动能力（6MWTD，中等效应量）和身体活动水平。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT evidence indicates that integrated cardiovascular rehabilitation for patients with TIA and mild stroke significantly improves functional exercise capacity and physical activity levels over 6 months. This strongly supports including such patients in cardiovascular rehabilitation programs.
items.limitation: 试验随访期为 6 个月，长期效果尚需进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: The trial's follow-up period is 6 months; longer-term effects require further study.

items.title: The psychosocial impacts of having eating and drinking difficulties after stroke: a qualitative evidence synthesis.
items.summary: This systematic qualitative evidence synthesis (22 studies, 645 informants) explored the psychosocial impacts of eating and drinking difficulties after stroke from the perspectives of stroke survivors, informal carers, and healthcare professionals, identifying significant psychological and social domains.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后吞咽和进食困难远不止生理问题，还会严重影响患者的心理健康和社会参与。在康复计划中，你要充分关注这些社会心理影响，提供全面的支持，而非仅关注吞咽机制。
items.titleZh: 卒中后吞咽和进食困难的社会心理影响：一项定性证据综合
items.summaryZh: 这项系统定性证据综合（纳入 22 项研究，645 名受访者）从卒中幸存者、非正式照护者和医疗专业人员的角度，探讨了卒中后吞咽和进食困难的社会心理影响，确定了显著的心理和社会影响领域。
items.curatedReasonEn: Eating and drinking difficulties after stroke go beyond physical problems; they also severely affect patients' psychological well-being and social participation. In rehabilitation plans, you should fully address these psychosocial impacts and provide comprehensive support, not just focus on swallowing mechanisms.
items.limitation: 作为定性证据综合，结果高度依赖于所纳入研究的质量和解释框架。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative evidence synthesis, the results are highly dependent on the quality and interpretive framework of the included studies.

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study of 333 ACDF patients found that sarcopenia significantly increases the risk of radiographic adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years post-surgery.
